title: RepoAccessProofEnvelope
description: Cryptographic proof envelope for Dead-Ledger/ALN-attested repository access, tier overrides, and RESEARCH entitlements. Provides zero-trust verification signals to age-tier-router-policy.v1.json and repo-access-capability.v1.json. Aligns with Consent Profile (Module 1), Age-Gated Tier Router (Module 5), and Zero-Trust Security Spine.

id.description: Stable identifier for this proof envelope instance; referenced by router policy and capability manifests.

schemaRef.description: Schema version identifier for validator binding and CI schema-checks.

objectKind.description: Object kind for CHAT_DIRECTOR routing, manifest validation, and audit tracing.

version.description: Semantic version; minor bumps add optional claim fields, patch bumps fix validation or revocation logic.

identityContext.description: Shared CHAT_DIRECTOR identity join keys; ensures proof binds to a specific session, region, and routing state.

sessionId.description: Opaque session UUID; ties proof to active consent and budget state.

regionId.description: Region contract identifier; used for geo-policy and jurisdictional compliance.

descriptorId.description: Content descriptor identifier; scopes proof to specific invariant/style bundles.

consentTier.description: Consent state at time of issuance; must align with router policy evaluation.

routerStateId.description: Reference to the active age-tier-routing-table instance at issuance time.

seedId.description: Optional spectral or narrative seed identifier; used when proof grants bundle-specific access.

selectorPatternId.description: Optional history-selector pattern ID; binds proof to specific routing paths.

sessionMetricsEnvelopeId.description: Optional telemetry envelope ID for audit correlation.

proofMetadata.description: Cryptographic and issuance metadata; enables zero-knowledge verification and revocation checks.

proofType.description: Category of attestation; dictates validation path and allowed entitlements.

authorityId.description: DID or registry ID of the issuing authority (e.g., regional age verifier, Dead-Ledger node).

publicKeyRef.description: URI to the issuer's verification key or JWKS endpoint.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiration timestamp; proof invalid after this time unless renewed.

signatureAlgorithm.description: Cryptographic algorithm used to sign the envelope payload.

payloadHash.description: Cryptographic hash of the entitlementScope and identityContext; prevents tampering.

entitlementScope.description: Explicit permissions granted by this proof; consumed by H.TierRouter and H.Registry.

requestedTier.description: Target tier this proof attempts to unlock or override to.

allowedRepos.description: Explicit repository access grants; must intersect with age-tier-routing-table.repoAccessRules.

invariantOverrides.description: Temporary numeric ceilings for spine invariants; only active while proof is valid.

DET.description: Dread Exposure Threshold; strictly clamped by tier ceilings.

maxConcurrentProofs.description: Maximum number of active proof envelopes allowed per session; prevents stacking.

deadLedgerAttestation.description: Dead-Ledger/ALN-specific attestation references; enables decentralized verification without exposing raw payloads.

bundleId.description: Dead-Ledger bundle identifier containing this proof's cryptographic commitments.

zkProofRef.description: Optional URI to zero-knowledge proof material (e.g., Groth16, PLONK) verifying claims without revealing PII.

attestationChain.description: Ordered list of intermediary attestation IDs forming the verification path.

ledgerTxId.description: Immutable ledger transaction ID recording proof issuance; used for audit and revocation checks.

revocationStatus.description: Current lifecycle state of this proof on the ledger.

complianceAndAudit.description: Regulatory, forensic, and policy compliance fields; enables continuous traceability and zero data leakage.

complianceFlags.description: Declarative compliance attestations verified at issuance.

auditRef.description: URI to immutable audit log or governance proposal that authorized this proof type.

autoRevokeOnConsentChange.description: If true, proof is automatically invalidated if user consent tier shifts downward.

maxUsageCount.description: Maximum allowed validation cycles before automatic expiration; 0 = unlimited.

cooldownAfterValidationMinutes.description: Mandatory wait period between consecutive proof validations to prevent rate abuse.

prismMeta.description: Standard prismMeta block for schema spine alignment; shape defined in prismMeta.v1.json.

governanceRef.description: Reference to promotion-proposal or governance artifact that approved this envelope type.
